query:
SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE 
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS 
WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'debt_collected_cache' 
AND ORDINAL_POSITION > 20
ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute 
SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE 
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS 
WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'debt_collected_cache' 
AND ORDINAL_POSITION > 20
ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE
penalty	decimal
unlock_fee	decimal
discount	decimal
overpaid	decimal
bad_debt	decimal
total_amount	decimal
updated_by	varchar
is_bad_debt_row	tinyint
populated_at	timestamp
updated_at	varchar
is_close_row	tinyint
remark	text
payment_tx_amount	decimal
debt_range	varchar
